name: Albassam — Private Family Office
description: A private family office ledger — lacquered obsidian scene, one gold gyroscope, editorial serif numerals, plates with real depth. v3 'The Instrument' (2026-07-09); supersedes the v2 paper-light system.

logo.notes: One mark in two weights: logos/header.svg is the khatam seal lockup (two rotated 18×18 squares + a 2r center dot, gold #C9A96A stroke) as shipped in the topbar <svg>. logos/favicon.svg is the simplified two-square favicon (no center dot) matching the inline data-URI <link rel="icon">. No raster logo, no apple-touch-icon, no og:image — the page ships meta name="robots" content="noindex" and isn't meant to be socially shared.

colors.name: Obsidian scene
colors.usage: page ground (from --scene; a fixed radial lift to #141821 at top center gives the scene depth; fixed 5% SVG grain overlay)

colors.name: Plate
colors.usage: cards/panels as vertical lacquer gradients #1A1E25→#14171D with 1px #262B33 hairline and inner top-light rgba(255,235,200,.07) (from --plate/--plate-2)

colors.name: Ivory
colors.usage: body text and figures (from --ink; secondary #A8A296, faint #938D81)

colors.name: Ink 60
colors.usage: secondary text — labels, captions (from --ink-2; faint tier --ink-3 #938D81 for hints and chart axes)

colors.name: Hair
colors.usage: hairlines, dividers, plate edges (from --hair; softer #1E232B between rows)

colors.name: Gold
colors.usage: the gyroscope, percentages, ledger tags, gold-faced primary buttons, chart line (from --gold; pale #E6D3A7, deep #8F7443, tint rgba(201,169,106,.12))

colors.name: Terracotta / Loss
colors.usage: negative figures and destructive actions only (from --loss; tint rgba(217,108,87,.13); never decorative). Gains use emerald #5FB48A with tint rgba(95,180,138,.13), equally rationed.

voice.tone: Quiet-luxury and custodial rather than corporate-SaaS: the copy reads like the ledger of a family office, not a fintech product. Short, formal nouns (Registry, Ledger, Members, Portfolio history) stand in for feature names. Sentence case everywhere; no exclamation points, no growth verbs, no casual contractions in headings. English only — the Arabic subtitle from v1 was removed by the owner's decision on 2026-07-06 and must not be reintroduced.

imagery.style: No photography — the identity is the 3D gyroscope seal (member ownership arcs precessing in preserve-3d with a gold underglow and echo ring), a fixed film grain, and the numbers themselves set in Fraunces.
imagery.treatment: Lacquer-dark plates lit from above (inner top-light + layered black shadows), thin gold linework, one slow precession (22s) plus pointer tilt on desktop, tick ring at 300s. All motion transform/opacity, disabled under prefers-reduced-motion. Structural gradients only (scene lift, plate lacquer, chart area, gold button face).

layout.spacing: 4px base unit; 16–24px component padding; 56–72px section rhythm
postureRules: Left-aligned product topbar (gold khatam + 'Albassam · Family office' in Fraunces, status pills right).
Asymmetric hero: holdings figure left in HTML type (Fraunces 300 with a soft glow text-shadow), the 3D gyroscope right; stacks centered on mobile. The value never renders inside the seal SVG.
The gyroscope is the only theatre: three preserve-3d layers (underglow −80px, echo −42px, crisp SVG), ±7° precession over 22s, pointer tilt via js/tilt.js on fine pointers only.
Stats are one segmented plaque (single plate, hairline-divided cells), not floating boxes.
Sentence-case Fraunces headings with muted one-line subtitles; the hero eyebrow is the only tracked-caps element.
Semantic color rationed: gold = brand, emerald #5FB48A gains only, terracotta #D96C57 losses only — never decorative.
Motion: precession + tilt, one hero entrance (rise/settle), hover lift on plates, active scale(0.98) — nothing else; cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); fully disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.
Buttons: gold-faced primary with dark ink text, plate-quiet, terracotta-ghost danger; gold focus rings on all interactive elements.
